title: Tiko Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tiko with a Z-Score of +3.20. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Tiko is causing extremely high temperatures, with a critical level of severity. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.2 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems. 
 The humidity level is at 68% and the wind speed is at 3.1 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
